  • Download Rmd

Checking 12S db coverage

In this project I am using the existing taxonomic classifier includding the FASTA sequences targetting 12S for vertabrate species (https://github.com/terrimporter/12SvertebrateClassifier/releases/tag/v2.0.0-ref). The aim is to compare this reference dataset with my species list from Cabañeros National Park to assess whether the species present in my study area are represented, providing a first estimate of coverage.

For full primer coverage I will test my primers “Mimammal” FW - GGGTTGGTAAATTTCGTGCCAGC RV -CATAGTGGGGTATCTAATCCCAGTTTG against the sequences

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(eDNAfuns)

Target species

species_df <- read_excel(here("data/Cabañeros lista de especies.xlsx")) %>%
  select(Genero_especie) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Genero_especie)) %>%
  mutate(Genero_especie = str_trim(Genero_especie))

Ref_db

Vert_12S_db <- fasta_reader(here("dbs/dbs/v2.0.0-ref/mytrainseq.fasta")) %>% separate(header, into= c("Accession", "tax"), sep = "\t")
Vert_12S_db <- Vert_12S_db %>% 
  mutate(species = str_extract(tax, "(?<=s__)[^;]+"),
         species = str_replace_all(species, "_", " "))

first check

Check rCRUX

first check

Combinar ambas bases

species_df_clean <- species_df %>% 
  mutate(species_join = tolower(trimws(Genero_especie)))

Vert_12S_db_clean <- Vert_12S_db %>% 
  mutate(species_join = str_extract(tax, "(?<=s__)[^;]+"),
         species_join = str_replace_all(species_join, "_", " "),
         species_join = tolower(trimws(species_join)))

rCRUX_tax <- rCRUX_tax %>% 
  mutate(species_join = tolower(trimws(species)))

ref_db <- bind_rows(
  Vert_12S_db_clean %>% select(species_join),
  rCRUX_tax %>% select(species_join)
) %>% distinct()

missing_taxa <- species_df_clean %>% 
  mutate (species_join= str_replace(species_join, "rana perezi", "pelophylax perezi")) %>% 
  anti_join(ref_db, by = "species_join")

FOr the missing ones, check GB to see if there are reference sequecnes that appear in GB but not yet in the curated databases

Now let’s see if the fragments contain our primers (it could be that the sequence is homologous but the submitters already deleted the primers)

MiMammalF <- "GGGTTGGTAAATTTCGTGCCAGC"
MiMammalR <- "CATAGTGGGGTATCTAATCCCAGTTTG"
NCBI_for_gaps %>% 
  mutate (target = map(seqs_12S, ~virtualPCR(.x, up= MiMammalF)) )

keep sequences of the ones that were found - fasta folder modify the search for mitohchondrion genome - ve cambiando el query (que te diga moncho que ir poniendo) base de satos de referencia y de las especies de datos que faltan tengo estas de q especies hay cosas y de cuales no y explorar base de datos de mitogenomas en vez de 12S mitochondrion
